title: Decadent Quesadilla
description: A rich and indulgent twist on the classic Mexican dish, loaded with creamy cheese and crunchy nuts.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium heat.
Lay a tortilla flat and sprinkle shredded cheese on half of it.
Add a sprinkle of chopped nuts and a pinch of cinnamon.
Fold the tortilla in half to enclose the filling.
Place the quesadilla in the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes or until the tortilla is crispy and the cheese is melted.
Flip the quesadilla and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the other side is crispy.
Repeat with the remaining tortillas and filling ingredients.
Cut the quesadillas into wedges and serve immediately.
